cli.character_creation.mode.intro:
[bold cyan]Creation mode[/bold cyan]:
  [bold]1[/bold] New character (random)
  [bold]2[/bold] Incarnate a canon character (Naruto, Itachi, Sasuke, ...)
cli.character_creation.no_canon_for_filt: No canon character with birth_year available for this filter.
cli.character_creation.id_prompt: Number, id, or character name [dim](e.g. 1, uchiha_itachi, 'Itachi')[/dim]
cli.character_creation.precise_year_prom: Specific year [dim](number, or 'r' for random within canon window)[/dim]
cli.character_creation.no_active_clan: [dim]No active clan in {village_id} year {starting_year}. You will be a civilian.[/dim]
cli.character_creation.start_age_prompt: Starting age [dim](years; canon: academy starting age 6)[/dim]
cli.play.no_objective: No declared objective. Use /declare or type "I declare an objective".
cli.play.no_personality_db: No personality database (Phase D not initialized).
cli.play.time_advanced: Time advanced by {n}{unit}. New date: year {year}, day {date}.
cli.play.no_fact_no_belief: No known fact and no belief recorded for {npc_id}.
cli.play.no_objective_pay: No declared objective. No one has anything to sell you.
cli.play.confirm_desertion: You are about to abandon everything and become nukenin. Confirm? (yes/no)
cli.play.no_weapon: No weapon equipped. Buy some at the shop or take them from opponents.
cli.play.no_summon_contract: No summoning contract signed. Find a sannin or sage to obtain one.
cli.character_creation.canon_no_birth_ye: [red]'{canon_id}' found but without canon birth_year (extraction gap). Choose another character.[/red]
cli.play.no_canon_npc_in_scene: No canon NPC named in the scene. If the situation involves interlocutors (sensei, parent, merchant, etc.), invent their role-based id (snake_case, e.g. sensei_academy, merchant_tavern) and have them speak.
cli.character_creation.era.prompt: Era [dim](number, id, or 'c' for custom year)[/dim]
cli.character_creation.summary.title: Recap
cli.play.shop.title: Shop in {village} ({money} ryos in pocket)
cli.play.summon_insufficient_chakra: Not enough chakra ({current}/{required} required for Kuchiyose).
cli.play.summons.toad.label: Toads of Mount Myoboku (Jiraiya/Naruto/Minato lineage)
cli.play.summons.snake.label: Snakes of Mount Ryuchi (Orochimaru/Sasuke lineage)
cli.play.summons.slug.label: Slugs of Mount Shikkotsu (Tsunade/Sakura lineage)
cli.play.summons.hawk.label: Hawks (post-revolt Sasuke lineage)
cli.play.summons.monkey.label: Monkeys (Hiruzen Sarutobi)
cli.play.summons.ninken.label: Pack of ninja dogs (Hatake lineage)

cli.play.summons.dragon.label: Dragons (Kakuzu, rare lineage)
api.play.skip_time.requires_positive_dur: At least one of days/weeks/months must be > 0
api.saves.canon_id_required: canon_id or canon_query required for mode='canon'
api.saves.body_empty: empty body: send the archive as octet-stream.
api.missions.unavailable: mission {mission_id} unavailable. Reload GET /missions/available to see current missions.
cli.play.tensions_kg_required: [yellow]KG not initialized. Tensions require Phase A.[/yellow]
cli.character_creation.canon_incarnation:
You will incarnate a canonical character at the age of your choice.
The world positions itself at the corresponding timeline. You are free
to follow canon or diverge (Phase F WorldResolver handles
consequences).
cli.play.session_resume:
You resume [bold yellow]{name}[/bold yellow] at year {year}, day {date}.
Type [cyan]/help[/cyan] for commands.
cli.play.mission_start: You leave for a mission: duration {hours}h.
cli.play.mission_partial_panel: You return wounded to the village. Reputation slightly damaged.
cli.play.knowledge_empty: You don't know anything important yet.
cli.play.flee_warning: You can choose to flee before the guard catches you.
cli.play.not_enough_ryos: Not enough ryos to live ({short} ryos missing).
cli.play.already_at_destination: You are already at the destination.
cli.play.summon_failed_msg: Your summoning fails. The chakra dissipates. Your hands tremble.
cli.play.summon_minor_text: A small creature of the {contract} lineage appears. Modest but faithful.
cli.play.summon_major_text: A major creature of the {contract} lineage appears in a cloud of smoke. It awaits your orders.
cli.play.reputation_intenable: Your reputation in {village} has become unbearable ({score}).
cli.play.help.techniques: List your known and in-progress techniques
cli.play.help.path: Ask the LLM pathfinder for the next step toward an objective
cli.play.help.sell: Sell an item from your inventory
cli.play.help.biography: Show biography journal (rank-ups, learned techniques, traumas)
cli.play.help.knowledge: Show what you know (canon events, revealed secrets)
cli.play.help.breadcrumbs: Show revealed sub-objectives not yet completed
cli.play.help.sign_contract: Sign a summoning contract (toad, snake, slug, hawk, etc.)
cli.play.help.invoke: Try to summon a creature (consumes 30 chakra)
cli.play.help.skip: Skip time: '/skip 7d' for 7 days, '/skip 1m' for 1 month
cli.play.help.journal: Show where the journal is located
cli.play.help.dialogues: Show last N captured dialogue lines (VN style)
cli.play.help.export_vn: Export the dialogue log in VN JSON format
cli.play.help.personality: Show personality vector + drift of an NPC (Phase D)
cli.play.help.beliefs: Sub-KG of an NPC: known facts + fidelity (Phase B §5.4)
cli.play.help.tensions: Detect narrative tensions via the 20 Phase C invariants (detector + analyst if due)
cli.play.help.tensions_llm: Force the LLM analyst (Qwen3-4B) on KG snapshot for narrative opportunities
cli.play.help.agent: Inspect 3-tier memory + recent actions of an agent
cli.play.help.fast_forward: Simulate N months without the player (event digest)
cli.play.help.quit: Save and return to main menu
cli.play.help.title: Meta commands
cli.character_creation.created_panel_bod:
Save: [yellow]{save_id}[/yellow]

Launch the session from the menu to start.
cli.character_creation.clan_inheritance: The [cyan]{clan_id}[/cyan] clan has a hereditary gift: [magenta]{candidates}[/magenta]
cli.character_creation.jinchuuriki_intro:
[bold red]You are born jinchuuriki:[/bold red] [magenta]{beast}[/magenta]
[dim]A tailed beast is sealed within you. The village will fear you. You will have to master its rage.[/dim]
cli.character_creation.too_young_warn: [yellow]At {age} year{plural}, your character is still too young to enter the academy. They will be classified as [bold]civilian[/bold] or [bold]infant[/bold]. Most actions will be limited until age 6.[/yellow]
cli.character_creation.first_objective_p: First objective [dim](free text, empty to skip)[/dim]
cli.character_creation.created_panel_int: [bold green]{name}[/bold green] lives in [cyan]{village}[/cyan] in year {year}.
cli.character_creation.filter_village_pr: Filter by village [dim](id, or empty for all)[/dim]
cli.character_creation.relaunch_with_id: Relaunch with a more precise id.
cli.character_creation.incarnation_summa:
[bold green]{name}[/bold green] lives in [cyan]{village}[/cyan] in year {year}.

Launch the session from the menu to start.
cli.character_creation.clan.prompt: Clan [dim](number, id, 0 for civilian, '?<n>' for details)[/dim]
cli.character_creation.inheritance_quest: Hereditarily, the gift flows in your veins (latent or active). Do you want it?
cli.character_creation.kekkei_mora_intro: [dim]An extremely rare kekkei mora. You carry within you a fragment of divine heritage.[/dim]
cli.play.tensions_detector_finals_header: [cyan]Deterministic tensions detector at end of fast-forward ({count}):[/cyan]
cli.play.contact_no_more_to_say: [yellow]The contact tells you they have nothing more to teach you for this objective.[/yellow]
cli.play.bingo_book_warning: The bingo book will speak of you.
cli.play.desertion_panel:
[bold red]You desert {village}.[/bold red]
[dim]You break your headband. The village hunts you now. {bingo}[/dim]
cli.play.already_nukenin: [yellow]You are already a nukenin. No need to declare flight again.[/yellow]
cli.play.contract_signed_panel:
[bold magenta]Contract signed: {contract}[/bold magenta]
[dim]{canonical}[/dim]
[dim]You can now summon a creature of this lineage with /invoke <name>.[/dim]
engine.items.no_inventory: You have no {item_id} in your inventory.
engine.items.unknown_effect: You use {item_id}. Narrative effect only, no defined mechanic.
engine.items.soldier_pill.summary: You swallow the soldier pill. Chakra +{gain}, but your body will pay the price later.
engine.items.blood_pill.summary: You swallow the blood pill. Regeneration accelerates: HP +{gain}.
engine.items.antidote.summary: You take the antidote. All poisons in circulation are neutralized.
engine.items.ration_bar.summary: You eat the ration. Fatigue slightly reduced.
engine.items.ramen_bowl.summary: The hot ramen bowl revives you. Fatigue -25, HP +10.
engine.items.first_aid_kit.summary: You use the medical kit. HP +{gain}, injuries healed.
engine.items.sake_jar.summary: You drink the sake jar. You feel more relaxed, but your perception suffers.
engine.items.smoke_bomb.summary: You activate the smoke bomb. An opaque cloud masks your retreat.
engine.items.explosive_tag.summary: You place the explosive tag. Ready to trigger.

engine.missions.D.tora_cat.title: Find Madame Shijimi's lost cat
engine.missions.D.tora_cat.description: The cat Tora has escaped for the umpteenth time. Classic Konoha genin mission.
engine.missions.D.harvest_help.title: Help with the harvest at the farms
engine.missions.D.harvest_help.descripti: The farmers need extra hands during harvest.
Escort a merchant to the next village
A merchant wants to reach the next village safely.
engine.missions.D.guard_shrine.title: Guard a shrine through the night
engine.missions.D.guard_shrine.descripti: Watch over a small local shrine until dawn.
engine.missions.D.repair_fence.title: Repair a rancher's fence
engine.missions.D.repair_fence.descripti: Basic manual work but essential for animal safety.
engine.missions.C.escort_merchant_interc: Escort a merchant between two countries
A week's journey, bandit risk on the road.
engine.missions.C.dismantle_bandits.desc: A group of 3 or 4 bandits operates on a trade route.
engine.missions.C.recover_stolen_artifac: A noble family heirloom has been stolen, find it and return it.
engine.missions.C.protect_caravan.title: Protect a caravan for 3 days
engine.missions.C.protect_caravan.descri: Journey with valuable goods through a fragile zone.
engine.missions.B.eliminate_chunin_deser: A nukenin fled the village with sensitive secrets.
engine.missions.B.infiltrate_oto.title: Infiltrate a minor Otogakure stronghold
engine.missions.B.infiltrate_oto.descrip: Extended espionage mission, contact with local sources.
engine.missions.B.escort_lord.title: Escort a lord during a diplomatic mission
engine.missions.B.destroy_organized_band: About thirty armed men, some with ninjutsu.
engine.missions.A.prevent_kage_plot.titl: Prevent a plot against the Kage
engine.missions.A.prevent_kage_plot.desc: Sensitive political mission with internal betrayal risk.
engine.missions.A.escort_diplomatic.titl: Escort a diplomatic delegation to a summit
engine.missions.A.escort_diplomatic.desc: Several enemy villages could sabotage the meeting.
engine.missions.A.recover_forbidden_scro: The scroll is in a disgraced sannin's lair.
engine.missions.S.eliminate_renegade_san: Legendary target, several ninja bodyguards, fortified lair.
engine.missions.S.capture_jinchuuriki.de: Morally difficult mission, target probably national.
engine.missions.S.steal_battle_plans.tit: Steal the rival Hokage's battle plans
engine.actions.dead: The character is dead. No action possible.
engine.actions.train_stat.non_trainable: You take yourself in hand and try to change {label}, but this does not come from your will. It is in your blood, in your ancestors. No effort will alter what birth gave you.
engine.actions.train_stat.intangible: You devote time to {label}. The mirror reflects an image almost identical to before. This kind of thing is not forged by will alone: it would take an encounter, a trial, or a defining event for real change to occur.
engine.actions.rest.already_rested: You settle down to sleep, but you are already perfectly rested. Sleep brings nothing more. Time passes, that's all.
engine.consequences.action.fight.taijuts: real combat was a true apprenticeship
engine.consequences.action.fight.strengt: your body hardened under the strain
engine.consequences.action.fight.speed: you had to dodge and react fast
engine.consequences.action.fight.percept: you learned to read enemy movements
engine.consequences.action.use_technique: executing a technique sharpened your control
engine.consequences.action.intimidate.so: imposing one's presence is an art
engine.consequences.action.seduce.social: seduction sharpens the reading of others
engine.consequences.action.seduce.percep: reading body language can be learned
engine.consequences.action.spy.intellige: deducing from the shadows is mental exercise
engine.consequences.action.bribe.social_: you learned to convince through money
engine.consequences.action.meditate.chak: chakra flows better when the mind is calm
engine.consequences.action.meditate.senj: first steps toward natural chakra perception
engine.consequences.action.move.percepti: observing the landscape on the way
engine.consequences.action.challenge.tai: measuring yourself against a strong opponent accelerates learning
engine.consequences.action.challenge.wil: daring to challenge forges the mind
engine.consequences.action.submit_missio: presenting your results is an exercise
engine.consequences.action.sell.social_c: selling is an art of persuasion
naming your ambition makes it real
engine.consequences.action.pay_for_infor: knowing where and what to ask
engine.consequences.mission.failed.willp: failing teaches more than not trying
engine.consequences.mission.failed.perce: you see more clearly what was missing
engine.consequences.mission.combat.willp: killing (or risking your life) tempers the mind
engine.consequences.mission.combat.stren: you had to strike with force
engine.consequences.mission.combat.socia: your success earns you a certain respect
you had to act fast when the trail appeared
engine.consequences.mission.civil.willpo: seeing a mission through, however mundane
engine.scene_context.constraint.player_s: The player is {age} years old, rank {rank}, in {village}.
engine.scene_context.constraint.too_youn: Too young for complex actions (light training, observation, talking to parents).
Too young to fight or move alone. Limited to home and the nearby neighborhood.
engine.scene_context.constraint.academy_: Academy student: confined to the village, day split between class and family.
engine.scene_context.constraint.cannot_l: CANNOT leave the village alone. Any outside action requires a guardian.
engine.scene_context.constraint.not_comb: Not in fighting condition (too young, injured, or untrained).
engine.scene_context.constraint.too_fati: Very fatigued, must rest before undertaking a demanding action.
engine.scene_context.constraint.low_chak: Chakra nearly empty, techniques very limited until recovery.
engine.scene_context.prompt.accessible_n: NPCs canonically accessible to the player right now:
engine.scene_context.prompt.no_accessibl: (no canon NPC accessible: only interactions are with generic NPCs)
engine.scene_context.prompt.notable_even: Canon events on the horizon (informational, do not spoil to the player):
engine.scene_context.prompt.rule_only_me: You must only PROPOSE or MENTION NPCs present in the list above.
engine.scene_context.prompt.rule_no_othe: You must NOT propose visiting a character in another village if the player cannot leave.
engine.scene_context.prompt.rule_age_app: You must NOT propose actions inappropriate for the player's age and rank (a 1-year-old student cannot fight).
engine.scene_context.prompt.rule_incoher: If the player attempts an incoherent action, narrate it as a contextual impossibility, not as a success.
agents.context_builder.fallback.drive_cl: Primary drive: preserve the honor and interests of the {clan} clan
agents.context_builder.fallback.drive_vi: Secondary drive: loyalty to {village} (unless clan in conflict)
agents.context_builder.fallback.never_de: - cause the fall of {village} for personal gain
agents.selector.system_prompt:
You are a canonical NPC of the Naruto universe. You take ONE action this turn.
You act according to your personality, relevant memory, your plans, and what you know of the world.
You respond STRICTLY in JSON conforming to the provided schema. No markdown.
Action choices: declare_intention, speak, travel, attack, search_information, meditate, plot, idle, custom.
Stay sober. No em-dashes. No emoji. No otaku slang.
agents.selector.instruction_block:
[INSTRUCTION]
Choose ONE JSON action conforming to the schema. Stay sober, in line with your personality and your plans.
agents.batch_selector.system_prompt:
You are a Naruto coordinator that produces actions for SEVERAL NPCs in a SINGLE response. You are given N NPC contexts. You produce EXACTLY N actions (one per NPC) in the same order as the contexts. Each action follows the standard schema.
Response: JSON {"actions": [<action1>, <action2>, ...]}. No markdown.
agents.batch_selector.instruction: [INSTRUCTION] Produce EXACTLY {count} actions, in agent order (1 to {count}). Format: JSON {{"actions": [...]}}. Strictly conforming to the schema.
agents.reflector.system_prompt:
You are a Naruto narrative agent. You are shown N recent observations of an NPC. Distill them into 1 to 3 higher-level reflections (insights, patterns, conclusions).
Each reflection cites source obs by id. JSON response conforming to the schema. No markdown.
agents.reflector.instruction: [INSTRUCTION] Distill into 1-3 reflections (text, gist, importance, source_observation_ids). JSON only.
agents.reflector.synthesis_text: Auto-synthesis: {count} observations between year {year_min} and {year_max}. Themes: {themes}.
